The Five Clubs

Choose a discipline to enter

Every club follows the same standard: learn, practise, submit your work, and receive a detailed evaluation against a clear skill rubric.

About the Club

Built on the same discipline that built the Sector.

The BGB Nilphamari Children's Club exists to give children of the Sector a structured, well-mentored place to build real skills outside the classroom — in code, language, art, and music.

Each discipline pairs a resident mentor with a guided AI review, so every submission gets specific, rubric-based feedback within moments — never a replacement for the mentor, always in support of one.

  • Five structured disciplines, one shared standard of review
  • Every submission evaluated against a written skill rubric
  • Mentors verify and follow up on every AI evaluation
  • Open to children of BGB Nilphamari Sector families
